description: The LegacyFeatureSettings component is best described on it's page, Settings.

fields.UseLegacyGripEquip: Toggles the ability to quick equip tools.
fields.UseLegacyWorldSwitcher: Toggles the old way of switching between sessions.
fields.UseLegacyInventorySessionShortcuts: Toggles the Legacy Inventory window. (Use left grip + dash menu button in VR, or use Ctrl + i in Desktop).
fields.SuppressFeetSimulation: This is to make certain features like posers that hijack feet proxies work, without having to modify them.
